channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Waste taking over pavement, 9th July
item.description:
Why are these bins here? They have been overflowing for more than a week and they’re on the pavement. No reason to have huge waste bins like this on a residential street in the middle of the foot path. They need removing from the street altogether.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 356, Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two potential sinkholes, 9th July
item.description:
Two potential sinkholes on the pavement over Hornchurch railway line getting noticeably bigger.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Swastika on corner of pavement, 9th July
item.description:
Someone has painted a swastika in white paint on the corner of the pavement outside the petrol station, in front of the bench between the trees. While not immediately visible from the road, walking past the bench it is obvious. At approximately ///faded.decks.hush on what3words

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Francis Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Foot path uneven, broken pavement, hazard, 9th July
item.description:
The roots from a large tree are displacing the footpath paving. This is dangerous for pedestrians and wheelchair users. It is also damaging the Thames Water access panel. The car(s) that need to enter and exit 64 Vassall Road, are getting damaged.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 89, Vassall Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa Dumped on roadside, 9th July
item.description:
Sofa Dumped on Alsike Road at the abbey wood rail station end on the bend by the gates next to rail track.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alsike Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water fountain, 9th July
item.description:
A constituent has emailed me the following I have just returned from Bexleyheath where I attempted to use the drinking water tap near the clock tower. It wasn't working, This is very serious given that we are in the middle of a dangerous heatwave. Can I ask you to have this fixed asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Friswell Place, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in the car park Melbury drive, 9th July
item.description:
This is the second time in recent weeks I’ve needed to report fly tipping in this location. I think there are cameras nearby if the council wanted to investigate.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 149, Southampton Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sleeping rough on New River path, 9th July
item.description:
There are tents now being lived in on the New River bank the Amhurst Park Road side (Seven Sisters Road end ). People are sleeping there with lots of belongings and litter. They may be using drugs - I'm not sure
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): New River Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pot hole, 9th July
item.description:
Road is collapsing there is a very large whole in the road and road surface is being swallowed up - this has been reported numerous times and nothing children and disabled people use this part of the road and Lewisham council are choosing to ignore this until someone is seriously injured or vehicle is damaged
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ludwick Mews, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain and drain channel full up solid, 9th July
item.description:
Gully and channel full
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Shaw, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missed grass cut, 9th July
item.description:
I live in Bethersden Close Beckenham BR3 1PE and the grass cutters have missed and not cut the 3 pieces of grass. They done copers cope road but as usual missed these. Please send a grass cutting crew to Bethersden Close Beckenham BR3 1PE to cut the 3 pieces of grass around car park. Also the bushes on 1 piece of the grass need serious trimming as it looks like a jungle and we can't see if a car is coming while crossing the car park. Please can you send a grass cutting crew to Bethersden Close Beckenham BR3 1PE to cut grass and trim bushes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bethersden Close, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign post leaning, 9th July
item.description:
P1240
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Shaw, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ignoring Road closure, 9th July
item.description:
Rosebery Avenue is closed due to road works. Buses, vehicles and bikes continue to turn left into Rosebery Avenue, blocking the road, pushing over barriers and causing possible accidents for the oncoming traffic. This evening at 8.10 pm, the 19 Bus turned left from Theobolds Road and got stuck. The driver came out and moved all the road barriers so he could drive the bus the wrong way down the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clerkenwell Road, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Column leaning but safe, 9th July
item.description:
41 r 1
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Shaw, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress has been dumped, 9th July
item.description:
A mattress has been dumped on the street, it is blocking the road please collect asap

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durham Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone has dumped two large black bags of rubbish in the pavement, 9th July
item.description:
Dumped bags outside 4 Springdale Road N169NX on the pavement by a treee, making it hard for prams and wheelchairs to pass.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Springdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on the streets, 9th July
item.description:
We had gutter cleaned this Monday but it's the Tennant of 65 colthurst crescent that throws all big rubbish into the gutter like big water bottles big shopping bags etc ive told him once but he is extremely rude. But we pay service charge and that cost us.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colthurst Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped household goods, 9th July
item.description:
Dumped household goods.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rattray Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rough sleeper in park lighting fires., 9th July
item.description:
As above. Leaving rubbish as well.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped van outside school gate, 9th July
item.description:
Reported this van two months ago dumped around the corner ?? This van was driven yesterday with flat tyres no lights and dumped outside St Margaret Clitherow Primary School gates now , I did phone 101 to report this problem because two men jumped out the van and ran away looking up to no good?? The police advised me to contact you ???

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shaw Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet
